heading: Definitions
label: 1401 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–161, div. E, title VI, § 601121 Stat. 2094Dec. 26, 2007“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Border Infrastructure and Technology Modernization Act of 2007’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–161, div. E, title VI, § 601121 Stat. 2094Dec. 26, 2007“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Border Infrastructure and Technology Modernization Act of 2007’.”

children.heading: Commissioner
children.label: 1 Commissioner
children.text: The term “Commissioner” means the Commissioner of U.S. Customs and Border Protection of the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Maquiladora
children.label: 2 Maquiladora
children.text: The term “maquiladora” means an entity located in Mexico that assembles and produces goods from imported parts for export to the United States.

children.heading: Northern border
children.label: 3 Northern border
children.text: The term “northern border” means the international border between the United States and Canada.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Southern border
children.label: 5 Southern border
children.text: The term “southern border” means the international border between the United States and Mexico.
